participants.bio: Joined IIH-COH10-190325. No profile bio submitted yet.

events.description: Today I had some me time, at home alone after work. It gave me time to decompress, clear my head after a busy day and I felt lighter.
I am going to tidy and declutter the spare room on On Saturday morning  and Sunday afternoon. I will aim to do this This will be a one off
@Mikki, having time for yourself is a precious thing to be thankful for. 😊 I hope you manage to get this space for yourself regularly.
@Mikki I love your goal, Tidying and decluttering can be so rewarding. I think I could do with a similar goal for our room thats full of boxes. I'm looking forward to finding out how you get on 😊
Hi Mikka, how's this goal going.  I need to do the same - any tips you can share?  Hope you managed to watch a movie, which one did you choose?

I am grateful for a chat I had with a lovely colleague.  From time to time we check in with each other and share a lot more than work. I started our chat feeling like things were so-so. By the end I felt things were better than so so, in fact I’d nervously venture that in one particular area I felt really good about something I have achieved. I felt lighter. And the best thing is, the positive has stuck and is a great point of reference for me when I’m trying to put some of this weeks stuff into practice (reframing). Thank you lovely D.
To finish off what I started - tidying the spare room.  on At Home at the weekend. I will aim to do this Over Saturday morning and Sunday afternoon

Mikki this is a great gratitude. Sharing with colleagues is important and it is great to hear that you share more than work. A light feeling is fabulous description and a wonderful feeling. I hope the feeling continues and it sounds as though this weeks materials have been really useful for you. Amanda 😊

Sometimes life gets in the way and recognising the need to postpone completion of a goal is the right thing to do. Sometimes it is useful to reframe the goal or break it up into smaller chunks. Ooh film suggestions for a reward great idea! My son wanted to watch A Quiet Place...not very relaxing but he and my husband were in fits of laughter when I nearly fell off the sofa at the jump scares.... Amanda

Hi Mikki, Recognising when you need help is so important and a goal completed in itself. Well done with the dump run and charity shop run these are on my list this weekend...I think I need to set this as a goal too Amanda
To go to a singing group taster session on  Monday on On Monday evening . I will aim to do this One off to start/weekly
@Mikki I love this goal, it's great that there is a group locally for you to go to. I'm really looking forward to finding out how you get on at your taster session. 😊

@Mikka, that's OK and thanks for the update.  Remember you can amend this goal completion date by going to the 3 dots. I'm just wondering, if there are any songs you've sung before that you can sing in the meantime? Perhaps create a new playlist of your favourites?

A light feeling is fabulous description and a wonderful feeling. I hope the feeling continues and it sounds as though this weeks materials have been really useful for you. Amanda 😊

events.description: That I was able to come home and relax in my house before picking the children up from school on a lovely Spring day.
I am going to go to the gym on Thursday 1.30pm, Saturday 9am and Monday 4pm. I will aim to do this 3 times per week
Lizzie Hi, well done on posting your first gratitude. Having a moment to relax in our busy day is so precious. 😊 I look forward to finding out what you are next grateful for.
@lizzie11 , a lovely SMARTER goal to enjoy with a perfect reward.  Looking forward to hearing how you get on.
@lizzie11 well done on completing your goal and recognising that it is fine to alter it as situations change 😊 Did you remember to book the lunch date with a friend? Even a small reward is valuable.

Continue going to the gym 3 times per week and try the Monday group class. Good to have a support group, meet some people.

Plan to go:
Friday 4pm/Saturday 8am
Sunday 8am
Monday 12 noon on At the gym, Saturday/Sunday/Monday . I will aim to do this 3 times.

Hi Lizzie, Physical activity is a great goal and it can help you in so many ways not just physically. Your confidence is high which is great. Trying a class is a really great idea as you say meeting other people is great to support you with your exercise goals. 😊
The Spring blue skies and a weekend to rest.
It is so lovely to see some sun 🌞 I hope you manage to get some rest during the week too.

@lizzie11, well done, having a family walk instead sounds so very lovely. Remember life happens and our goals can change, be kind to yourself and rather than thinking you didn't complete it, change or postpone the goal. Just click the three dots and you can amend or suspend your goal.
Play games with my children  on On holiday in Cornwall . I will aim to do this Every day we're away
Have a wonderful holiday! Enjoy playing with your children, I understand how precious such quality time with them is. 🩷
I love this goal and look forward to hearing about the games you play and the easter egg! Enjoy cornwall and have a lovely holiday. What is your favourite easter egg? Amanda 😊

@lizzie11 I hope you had a wonderful holiday. How did you get on with your goal? I imagine you had plenty of fun with your family. Did you manage to complete your goal? We would love to hear how you get on. Please be kind to yourself if you didn't quite manage your goal; setbacks are perfectly normal.

Practice the piano more on Thursday, Sunday and Tuesday next week . I will aim to do this 3 times a week for the rest of the course

events.description: I am grateful for my nurse today in hospital, who recognised I am having a really tough time and has organised for me to speak to one of their psychologists!
I am going to write a blog this week - topic TBC. on I will use my tablet . I will aim to do this Once let week

@amanda85, so sorry to hear that you're having a really tough time, but glad that your nurse was there for you and that more support is on it's way. Here's hoping that some of the information shared in this weeks session also makes a difference for you.  Take care.

@amanda85 sounds like a really interesting goal for this week and perhaps over the next 6 weeks of Hope.  Getting started is often the hardest.  But you've taken the first step, you've got a plan, your words will soon start to flow for your treat to then follow.  Really looking forward to hearing how you get on.

Hi, @amanda85, How did you get on with writing your blog? Maybe you've completed it but just forgot to feedback? No problem 😊 just click on the three dots and select Feedback to give us an update. 

Remember setbacks are normal, so it's OK to be kind to yourself and pause or not complete the goal

events.description: I'm grateful for the weather today, it has been 15 degrees where I live, so it hasn't caused my symptoms to flare up like when the weather was a bit warmer 2 weeks ago. I ordered some new sunglasses that came today and I love them as they make everything so much darker which I'm loving. I managed a walk on my own today, which I have been struggling to do because of dizziness and heart palpitations. I'm also really grateful for the people at the pharmacy, they are always so kind to me.
I am going to walk 6000 steps a day on Midday- Park or at the gym. I will aim to do this 5/6 days a week
Hi Olivia, Lots of gratitudes in here and its great that you can find so many. Well done for managing a walk on your own today some more walks would make a lovely goal that you can build up. Amanda 😊

Olivia, I just saw this after commenting on your gratitude! great to see that you are making walking a goal. I notice that your confidence is low and it might be good to scale back for example on how many days or how long you do it for each time. Taking small steps towards a bigger goal is sometimes really helpful and makes it more achievable. Amanda 😊

priorFacilitatorReplies.text: Hi Olivia, Lots of gratitudes in here and its great that you can find so many. Well done for managing a walk on your own today some more walks would make a lovely goal that you can build up. Amanda 😊

events.description: Try and be more active and not worry so much . Go for more acupuncture. on Walking , my local area . I will aim to do this I will try each day But not push myself to hard

Hi, @lisa141 these are really great goals to have 😊 I see your confidence in completing your goals is only a 3. Research shows smaller specific goals are more achievable. Perhaps choose the one of these most important to you and set a day to do it. You can always increase your goal if you find you are able to do more. Perhaps you would enjoy doing something more if your daughters do it with you? 

I'm looking forward to finding out how you get on. 😊
